SELECT id, displayName, totalPoints, daysComplete, currentStreak, longestStreak FROM participants 
WHERE displayName LIKE '%Glodge%' OR displayName LIKE '%glodge%' OR displayName LIKE '%Wiwi%' OR displayName LIKE '%wiwi%'
ORDER BY displayName;
